queries: sales pipeline visualization CRM kanban board stages UI best practices
deal flow pipeline dashboard visualization stages scoring UI
gamification sales pipeline dashboard progress achievements UI
takeaways: Deal-flow interfaces commonly organize work by pipeline stages and make bottlenecks visible.
Qualification, evidence, safety, and close readiness can be represented as route gates without requiring live outreach.
A reusable lane minigame should score generic trail and count signals rather than hard-coded workspace assumptions.

imageGeneration.prompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: website game module background texture for a static dashboard minigame. Primary request: premium dark game UI background for an Offer Route module about lead generation, sales qualification, truthful outreach, offer packaging, and safe channel gates. Scene/backdrop: futuristic deal room strategy table with glowing pipeline lanes, offer cards, qualification locks, route arrows, stage gates, opt-out safety rails, and warm contract-light accents. Subject: abstract sales route board, cards, gates, signal nodes, protected channel paths, small luminous deal tokens; no people. Style/medium: polished 3D game concept art, premium SaaS-game hybrid, sophisticated and restrained. Composition/framing: wide landscape dashboard texture, dark open center with negative space for UI cards, richer detail along left and right edges, no frame or border. Lighting/mood: high-end command center, focused, strategic, warm amber and coral highlights balanced with teal control lights. Color palette: dark charcoal, muted coral, amber, teal, small green success accents, subtle violet only in shadows. Materials/textures: smoked glass, matte graphite, holographic pipeline lines, satin metal, soft volumetric glow. Constraints: no text, no letters, no numbers, no logos, no watermark, no people, no brand marks, no currency symbols, avoid clutter in the center.

frontend: Added offer-route dispatch in renderGameView and gameStepCount.
Added buildOfferRouteStages to derive five sales-route stages from lane trail text, counts, artifacts, traces, blockers, and gates.
Added renderOfferRouteGame and renderOfferStage with focused controls, route verdict, animated pipeline, route nodes, and stage cards.
Added responsive Offer Route CSS for docked detail panels, stacked desktop, and mobile layouts.

commands: rg -n "[^\x00-\x7F]" web/index.html web/app.js web/styles.css web/README.md web/data/lane-visuals.json reports/agent-company-atlas-offer-route-trace-metadata-20260617.json
